summary: Backend-only testing for Red de Amor y Solidaridad. Created pytest suite (40 tests) covering categories, auth (login/register/me), entrepreneurs CRUD + gating, contact, admin stats/CRUD/export. All 40 tests PASSED.

minor.issue: If entrepreneurs collection already has any docs, seed_sample_data() is skipped. First run seeds admin + 6 entrepreneurs + 1 demo client. Fine for this iteration.

allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is rejected by most browsers; credentials cookies will NOT be sent cross-origin. Bearer header works. Consider using explicit origin (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) with allow_credentials=True.
Protected by get_current_user; if token already expired, user cannot clear their cookie. Minor.

action_items: Consider tightening CORS: replace allow_origins=['*'] with the explicit frontend origin so httpOnly cookie auth works cross-site (currently only Bearer header works reliably).
No blocking issues. Main agent may proceed with frontend testing/implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS: allow_origins=['*'] + allow_credentials=True is spec-invalid; browsers drop cookies. If frontend relies on httpOnly cookie auth, switch to explicit origin. Bearer token flow is unaffected.
GET /api/entrepreneurs/preview takes precedence correctly over /api/entrepreneurs/{eid} because it is declared first (FastAPI matches in order). Good.
admin_delete_entrepreneur deletes user by id AND role=entrepreneur — good safeguard against accidentally nuking admin accounts.
password_hash is excluded in get_current_user and public_user; no password leakage observed.
Startup seed idempotency: admin is updated if password changed (good). Sample entrepreneurs only seeded when entrepreneurs collection is empty (acceptable).
Input validation via Pydantic is strong (EmailStr, min/max lengths). Bad category -> 400, short password -> 422 both verified.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login — not in scope of this iteration but worth adding.
test_credentials: See /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin/ent/client seeded accounts all verified to login successfully.
seed_data_creation: No new persistent seed data. Tests create-and-cleanup (TEST_ prefixed) their own entrepreneurs/clients/messages via admin endpoints. Backend auto-seeds 6 sample entrepreneurs + 1 demo client + 1 admin on startup when DB empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints for this app pass. Use login_token() helper + auth_headers() to avoid cookie leakage between tests (httpOnly cookie set on every auth endpoint). Email is lowercased server-side; compare with email.lower() in assertions. Pydantic min_length violations return 422; business logic errors (bad category, duplicate email) return 400.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Initial test failures in first run were due to a shared requests.Session inadvertently accumulating httpOnly cookies from prior auth calls, which then made unauthenticated tests appear to pass auth. Resolved by switching to per-request calls (no shared session).
